hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"[TechShop] Ao iniciar: leia memory-bank/active-context.md e memory-bank/question-status.md. docs/PRD.md = unica fonte normativa; memory-bank/ = unica continuidade operacional persistente; review-checklist.md fica em memory-bank/; state/* e scratch opcional."}'

echo '{"systemMessage":"[TechShop] Antes de encerrar: sincronize memory-bank/question-status.md, memory-bank/handoff.md, memory-bank/active-context.md e, se houve revisao, memory-bank/review-checklist.md. current-task.md e session-log.md sao scratch opcionais."}'
